# Product Reviews

Acme Shop prioritizes customer feedback by implementing a transparent product review system. After a purchase, verified buyers receive an email invitation to submit their reviews within 7 to 14 days post-delivery, ensuring they have sufficient time to evaluate the product. Each review goes through a moderation process that checks for guideline compliance, with approved reviews visible on the product page, impacting the overall star rating.

[Source: product_information.md#product-reviews]
